---
title: "A | CFA Live"
format: live-html
engine: knitr  
status: "Version 0.1"
lang: de 
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
 
## 3-Faktor-CFA 

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

webr::install("quadprog",  repos = "https://kroehne.github.io/webr-quadprog-repo")
 
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(mnormt))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaan))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaanPlot))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT))

assignInNamespace("lav_options_checkinterval", function(x, nm, num2int) {
    if (any(is.na(x))) return(TRUE)
    if (num2int) x <- as.integer(x)                                                                                              
    oks <- vapply(x, function(x1) {
      (x1 > nm$bounds[1] || (x1 == nm$bounds[1] && nm$first.in)) &&                                                              
      (x1 < nm$bounds[2] || (x1 == nm$bounds[2] && nm$last.in))                                                                  
    }, TRUE)
    all(oks)                                                                                                                     
  }, ns = "lavaan")

model_3f <-  "visual  =~ x1 + x2 + x3
              textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
              speed   =~ x7 + x8 + x9"

fit_3f <- cfa(model_3f, data = HolzingerSwineford1939)


View <- function(dat){
  dat_name <- deparse(substitute(dat))
  df_display <- dat |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "âťŚ (NA)", .x))
  )
  
  DT::datatable(
    df_display,
    rownames = FALSE, 
    options = list(
      pageLength = 5,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = 'tip',   
      columnDefs = list(list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all"))
    ),
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = 'caption-side: top; text-align: left;',
      'data.frame: ', htmltools::strong(dat_name)
    )
  )  
}
```


### Daten

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
library(lavaan)
View(HolzingerSwineford1939)

```

### Modell-Syntax

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
model_3f <-  "visual  =~ x1 + x2 + x3
              textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
              speed   =~ x7 + x8 + x9"
model_3f
```

### Modell-SchĂ¤tzung

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
library(lavaan)
model_3f <-  "visual  =~ x1 + x2 + x3
              textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
              speed   =~ x7 + x8 + x9"
fit_3f <- cfa(model_3f, data = HolzingerSwineford1939)
summary(fit_3f)
```

### Standardisierte LĂ¶sung

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
standardizedSolution(fit_3f)[1:9, 
            c("lhs","op","rhs","est.std")]
```

### Pfaddiagramm

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
library(lavaanPlot)
lavaanPlot(model = fit_3f,   
     coefs = TRUE, stand = TRUE,covs = TRUE)
```

<details>
<summary>Alternativen zur Darstellung</summary>

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
library(tidySEM)
graph_sem(fit_3f)
```

Empfohlen, aber funktioniert nur lokal in R:

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
library(semPlot)

semPaths(
  fit_3f,
  what = "std",
  layout = "tree",  
  rotation = 2 
)
```

</details>


### Modellfit

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
fitMeasures(fit_3f, c("chisq", "df", "pvalue",
                       "cfi", "tli",
                       "rmsea", "rmsea.ci.lower",
                       "rmsea.ci.upper", "srmr"))
```



### Faktorkorrelationen

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
lavInspect(fit_3f, "cor.lv")
```




### Residualkorrelationen

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
resid(fit_3f, type = "standardized")$cov
```
